candidates.row_label: Depreciation of tangible fixed assets according to plan
candidates.why: Pure depreciation row, but nothing in the label ties it specifically to COGS / cost of sales. The selected COGS bucket is only 'Goods for resale', and no separate COGS-specific D&A row is visible.

candidates.row_label: Amortization according to plan of right-of-use assets
candidates.why: Pure amortization/depreciation-style operating row, but not labelled as relating to cost of sales. It appears as a general operating D&A line rather than a COGS-specific add-on.
Operating D&A row, but no wording connects it to COGS. More likely a general operating/overhead lease depreciation line than a merchandise cost component.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Goods for resale'. The excerpt shows no explicit depreciation/amortisation row labelled as COGS, cost of sales, or cost of revenue. To avoid double counting and unsupported allocation, no separate COGS D&A row is added.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of tangible fixed assets according to plan
candidates.why: Pure depreciation row above operating profit and separate from the selected XSGA component rows ('Other External Costs' and 'Personnel expenses'). Since the selected XSGA bucket excluded D&A and this line sits alongside those rows, it should be added separately rather than assumed embedded.

candidates.row_label: Amortization according to plan of right-of-use assets
candidates.why: Pure right-of-use asset amortization/depreciation row presented separately at the same operating level as the selected XSGA components, so it appears outside the existing XSGA bucket and suitable to add separately.

candidates.row_label: Amortisation of capitalised expenditure for IT systems
candidates.why: Pure amortization component of intangible assets, shown separately above operating profit. With no SG&A total selected and D&A intentionally excluded from the parent XSGA selection, this looks like a separate operating D&A add-back for overhead.
Separate amortization line above operating profit, not obviously embedded in 'Other External Costs' or 'Personnel expenses'. It appears to be another operating D&A component to add separately.
Small but explicit amortization line above operating profit. It is a separate operating D&A component and not part of the selected XSGA component rows.
Also a pure depreciation line, but it appears to overlap with 'Amortization according to plan of right-of-use assets' in some periods, so using both would risk double counting.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket contains only 'Other External Costs' and 'Personnel expenses', so explicit operating D&A lines shown separately above operating profit appear to sit outside that bucket and should be added separately. Rows containing 'impairment' were excluded per instruction, so component rows were chosen instead of the mixed summary rows. Manual review is flagged because the statement does not explicitly allocate these D&A lines between COGS and SG&A, and 'Depreciation of Lease Right-of-Use Assets' appears potentially overlapping with 'Amortization according to plan of right-of-use assets', so it was excluded conservatively.
